tickets.title: Project scaffold — build, test and CI wiring
spec: Repo builds from a fresh clone
CI runs the suite on every push

activity.text: Starting work. Will update with approach.
Plan locked — scaffold first, CI second.
Merged to main. Suite green on CI.

tickets.description:
Stand up the project skeleton so every later ticket lands on a working base.

## Scope

- Build tooling + scripts (`build`, `test`, `lint`)
- CI pipeline running the suite on every push
- A `README` stub with setup steps

## Acceptance

- A fresh clone builds and tests green with two commands.

tickets.title: Design tokens + base layout shell
tickets.description:
One source of truth for color/spacing/type, plus the app shell every screen mounts into.

- Tokens as CSS variables
- Light/dark from the host theme
- Shell: header, content, status strip

tickets.title: Import pipeline — fetch, validate, store
spec: Malformed rows are quarantined, not dropped

activity.text: Plan locked — staged ingest with a quarantine table.
UAT pass 1 bounced — duplicate handling regressed.

tickets.description:
The ingest path everything depends on.

## Behaviour

- Fetch source data on a schedule **and** on demand
- Validate rows against the schema; quarantine failures with a reason
- Idempotent re-runs (hash-keyed upserts)

## Notes

Bounced once in UAT (duplicate handling) — fixed and re-verified on pass 2.

tickets.title: Dashboard — live results table with filters

activity.text: Plan locked — table first, filters second, live updates last.

tickets.description:
The screen users live in: results as a fast, filterable table.

- Combined filters: status, date range, free text
- Live updates over the existing socket — **no reload**
- Empty/error/loading states designed, not defaulted

tickets.title: Notifications — digest email + in-app toasts
spec: Digest sends once per day, deduped
tickets.description:
Two channels, one preference model.

- Daily digest email (deduped against in-app reads)
- In-app toasts for urgent events only
- Per-user channel preferences

tickets.title: Bulk actions — select, tag, archive
tickets.description: Multi-select on the dashboard table with the three bulk verbs people actually use: tag, archive, export.

tickets.title: Onboarding — first-run checklist
spec: A new user reaches a populated dashboard in under 3 minutes
tickets.description: First-run experience: connect a source, run the first import, see real data — guided, skippable, under three minutes.

tickets.title: Performance pass — p95 under 200ms on the dashboard
tickets.description: Measure first (tracing on the three hottest interactions), then fix the top offenders. Budget: p95 < 200ms at 50k rows.

tickets.title: Launch checklist — docs, error pages, status page
spec: Every external error state has a designed page
Docs cover setup + the five core flows
tickets.description: The unglamorous list that makes it feel finished: real error pages, a status page, and docs for the five core flows.
